cards.name: Galadriel
cards.quote: Her gaze falls like starlight on still water, deep enough to unsettle the proud.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal a hidden artifact <sprite name="artifact"> on a visible hex.

cards.name: Elrond
cards.quote: His counsel carries the weight of ages, and still it does not grow weary.
cards.actionEffect: Heal a random controlled character by 30.

cards.name: Thranduil
cards.quote: The Elvenking wears pride like a crown of winter leaves, and the forest knows him.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 3 ar <sprite name="ar"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Cirdan
cards.quote: He has waited so long by the West that even the sea seems to listen.
cards.actionEffect: Build a port <sprite name="port"> on a controlled settlement that lacks one.

cards.name: Bannerlords
cards.quote: Their banners ride before them like dawn over a forest ridge, bright with the memory of elf-lords.

cards.name: Elven Archers
cards.quote: Their shafts go out like whispers, and the woodland answers in silence.

cards.name: Elven Elk Riders
cards.quote: The elk run as if the earth itself had taken heart and chosen speed.

cards.name: Elven Fleet
cards.quote: Their keels cut the quiet water like moonlight drawn into a blade.

cards.name: Elvenking Guards
cards.quote: They stand where the trees grow oldest, and no lesser shadow passes unhindered.

cards.name: Galadhrim Archers
cards.quote: From the mallorn boughs their arrows fall like silver rain on the unwise.

cards.name: Half Elves
cards.quote: They belong to two histories, and carry the strength of both when the road grows dark.

cards.name: Hall Guards Of Thranduil
cards.quote: In the halls beneath the trees, their spears keep the hush unbroken.

cards.name: Noldo Cavalry
cards.quote: The Noldor ride as if exile were a spur and memory a banner.

cards.name: The Golden Host
cards.quote: Bright as a summons at dawn, they gather where a kingdom means to answer.

cards.name: Woodelf Archers
cards.quote: The forest teaches them patience, and patience is the deadliest bow.

cards.name: Woodelf Warriors
cards.quote: They fight with the rough grace of leaf and branch, and do not yield easily.

cards.name: Wood Elves
cards.quote: Older than many songs, they move as if the woodland were their first home.

cards.name: Elven Scouts
cards.quote: They read the path before the path is made, and vanish before the answer comes.

cards.name: Elven Warriors
cards.quote: They fight as the deep wood fights, with patience, grace, and sudden wrath.

cards.name: Caras Galadhon
cards.quote: In Caras Galadhon, the trees keep their own counsel, and none should presume to answer for them.

cards.name: Thanduil's Halls
cards.quote: The hush of Thanduil's Halls is deep as root and as old as the first road through the dark.

cards.name: Eregion
cards.quote: Eregion remembers the old craft, where silver hammers once sang beside the river.

cards.name: Lothlorien
cards.quote: Lothlorien keeps its grace like a sealed light, and gives it only to those it trusts.

cards.name: AmonLind
cards.quote: AmonLind gleams with the old patience of a watchman who has seen the dusk before.

cards.name: CarasAmarth
cards.quote: CarasAmarth watches from the black wood as if the trees themselves had been set to guard a secret.

cards.name: CeberFanuin
cards.quote: At CeberFanuin, the boughs bend low enough to listen, but not to forgive.

cards.name: Celebannon
cards.quote: At Celebannon, the boughs bend low enough to listen, but not to forgive.

cards.name: CerinAmroth
cards.quote: CerinAmroth lifts a green and golden hush above LÃ³rien, where even sorrow seems to keep its distance.

cards.name: Elostirion
cards.quote: Elostirion keeps its gaze westward, as if memory itself were a star.

cards.name: Forlond
cards.quote: Forlond faces the western sea with the old patience of the Eldar, and its shore is never idle.

cards.name: Harlond
cards.quote: Harlond stands by tide or river as if waiting for something that has not yet named itself.

cards.name: The Grey Havens
cards.quote: The Grey Havens look west with a sorrow that has long since learned grace.

cards.name: Rhubar
cards.quote: Rhubar lies beneath the weight of old kings, and the stones still know their names.

cards.name: NorthernMirkwood
cards.quote: North Mirkwood is a place where every shadow remembers a hunter.

cards.name: SouthernMirkwood
cards.quote: South Mirkwood is old with trails, fumes, and the patient watch of hidden things.

cards.name: Climbing the White Hills
cards.quote: From high stones, the world opens and the heart remembers hope.
cards.actionEffect: If played on hills or mountains, reveal the surrounding area in radius 2, and allied Hobbit and Elf units gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Road to Rivendell
cards.quote: There are roads that remember the brave.
cards.actionEffect: The road west is ever kind to the small and the stubborn. Hobbits and Dwarves in radius 2 gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> and Haste <sprite name="haste">; Fear <sprite name="fear"> and Halted <sprite name="halted"> are cleared.

cards.name: Palantir Glimpse
cards.quote: Not all that is seen should be trusted, but even a perilous vision may tear the veil from what was hidden.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal 3 unseen hexes for 1 turn and gain Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Words of Warding
cards.quote: A single phrase, rightly spoken, may set a stronger wall than stone.
cards.actionEffect: One allied character in this hex gains Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> and Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: The Hidden Script
cards.quote: What was forgotten is not always lost; sometimes it merely waits for the right reader.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal 1 hidden artifact site and draw 1 card.

cards.name: Light Through Cloud
cards.quote: A clear thought and a clean light may scatter a whole host of lesser shadows.
cards.actionEffect: The beacons are lit. All allied units gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> and lose Fear <sprite name="fear">; all enemies are Halted <sprite name="halted"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Rune of the West
cards.quote: The mark itself is small; the memory behind it is not.
cards.actionEffect: Ancient runes of the West shine once more. A free people character gains Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> and Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Far-Speaking Thought
cards.quote: Mind may travel where foot cannot, and warning may arrive before the enemy does.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the hexes of up to 2 nearby enemy units and remove Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> from them.

cards.name: King of Taur Romen
cards.quote: The King of Taur Romen keeps the eastern road in his thought.
cards.actionEffect: Increase loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 15 on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Ohtar
cards.quote: Ohtar is a man of the long watch and the silent step.
cards.actionEffect: Restore action <sprite name="action"> to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Tauriel
cards.quote: Tauriel walks the border as if it were a vow.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hexes in radius 2 around all controlled characters.

cards.name: Tharudan
cards.quote: Tharudan keeps his oath as a blade kept clean.
cards.actionEffect: Grant 10 XP to all controlled armies.

cards.name: Taladhan
cards.quote: Taladhan walks light, as if the road were a thing to be read.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hexes in radius 2 around all controlled characters.

cards.name: Faemir
cards.quote: Faemir walks under a burden that silence cannot ease.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hexes in radius 2 around all controlled characters.

cards.name: Counsel By Firelight
cards.quote: In the hush before the road resumes, the right counsel may cast aside folly and place a truer course in the hand.
cards.actionEffect: Discard 1 non-encounter card from your hand, then draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Stay the Dark Tale
cards.quote: Not every shadow must be faced at once; sometimes wisdom is to close the book and choose another hour.
cards.actionEffect: Remove 1 encounter card from your hand and replace it with 1 drawn card.

cards.name: Swan Fleet
cards.quote: With the grace of swans, we sail upon the waters, ready for the call of destiny.

cards.name: Mounted Dunadan Rangers
cards.quote: On swift horses the Dunedain pass like wind and shadow.

cards.name: A Light in Dark Places
cards.quote: Even a small light is hated by the dark.
cards.actionEffect: All allied units in radius 2 gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> (1 turn) and lose Fear <sprite name="fear">/Despair <sprite name="despair">.

cards.name: Arrows of the Galadhrim
cards.quote: The Galadhrim loose their arrows like leaves in storm.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy in same/adjacent hex: deal moderate damage and, if the target is on forest terrain, apply Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Rhudaur
cards.quote: Rhudaur keeps its watch in broken and haunted silence.

cards.name: Rivendell
cards.quote: Rivendell keeps its own light when the East is dim.

cards.name: Lindon
cards.quote: Lindon remembers the first westward light.

cards.name: Imladris
cards.quote: In Imladris grief is borne as song, and not as burden.

cards.name: Behind Noldo Shields
cards.quote: Behind Noldo shields, the old pride of the Elves still stands.
cards.actionEffect: All allied elves in radius 1 gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn) and lose Fear <sprite name="fear">.

cards.name: FordOfBruinen
cards.quote: Bruinen's ford grants passage only on the river's terms.
cards.actionEffect: The ford rises at Elrond’s command and does not forget allegiance. Allied units on shore or water in radius 2 gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged">; non-army allies gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden">; enemies there are Halted <sprite name="halted">.

cards.name: Gift of the Evenstar
cards.quote: The Evenstar is a gift given while the West still has breath.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character gains Hope <sprite name="hope"> (2 turns) and removes Fear <sprite name="fear">/Despair <sprite name="despair">.

cards.name: The Power of Nenya
cards.quote: Nenya keeps a hidden gleam against fading days.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied PC: hide it for 2 turns and grant Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> to nearby allied units.

cards.name: The Power of Vilya
cards.quote: Vilya's light endures where wounds would not close.
cards.actionEffect: Allied characters in radius 1 are fully healed, and Foam on the Water is cast in radius 2-4 depending on the caster's Mage <sprite name="mage"> level.

cards.name: Bound in Hithlain
cards.quote: Hithlain binds lightly, yet fast as a spoken oath.
cards.actionEffect: Elvish rope remembers who holds it. Target ally gains Hidden <sprite name="hidden">; on forest or mountain tiles they also gain Haste <sprite name="haste">.

cards.name: Swift as the Galadhrim
cards.quote: The Galadhrim go swift and soundless among the leaves.
cards.actionEffect: None move through forest as the Galadhrim do. Target ally gains Haste <sprite name="haste"> and Hidden <sprite name="hidden">; on forest tiles they also lose Fear <sprite name="fear">.

cards.name: Treasures of Lasgalen
cards.quote: In Lasgalen, treasure is kept where root and bough defend it.
cards.actionEffect: All allied Elf characters in radius 2 gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> (1 turn), and one wounded allied character in your hex heals a moderate amount.

cards.name: Token of the Woodland Realm
cards.quote: A token from the Woodland Realm bears more than memory.
cards.actionEffect: A gift from the Lady’s hand is never given lightly. Target ally gains Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (3) and +1 to skill checks while Hidden; Elves also reveal Hidden enemies in an adjacent hex.

cards.name: Lorien Belt
cards.quote: The belt of Lorien is woven for passing in secret.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns) and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Silmarilion
cards.quote: The Silmarillion is lore too bright for careless hands.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (1 turn), and your next FindArtifact here is easier.

cards.name: Visions in the Mirror
cards.quote: What the mirror reveals is not soon forgotten.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal unseen hexes equal to Mage <sprite name="mage">, up to 7.

cards.name: VisionsOfTolEressea
cards.quote: Visions of Tol Eressea are a westward dream the Wise do not cast aside.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied Elf in your hex gains Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Arwen
cards.quote: I would rather share one lifetime with you than face all the ages of this world alone.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Hope <sprite name="hope"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Celeborn
cards.quote: In the light of Lothlórien, all things are revealed, and shadows cannot linger.
cards.actionEffect: Encourage <sprite name="encouraged"> all controlled characters for 1 turn(s).

cards.name: Galdor
cards.quote: We are the voice of the ancient woods, and our words carry the weight of ages.
cards.actionEffect: Increase loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 10 on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Glorfindel
cards.quote: I have returned, and the shadows shall not claim this land while I stand.
cards.actionEffect: Encourage <sprite name="encouraged"> all controlled characters for 2 turn(s).

cards.name: Haldir
cards.quote: We will guard the borders, for the light of our people must not fade.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hexes in radius 3 around all controlled characters.

cards.name: Legolas
cards.quote: A shadow stirs in the east; my arrows shall find their mark in the dark.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 3 ar <sprite name="ar"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Mithrandir
cards.quote: Among the Elves I am Mithrandir. The road goes ever on — and I have walked it long.
cards.actionEffect: Apply ArcaneInsight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Counsel to Galadriel
cards.quote: The mirror shows what the willing eye is ready to see.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal radius 3 for 1 turn. Target allied character gains Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Counsel to Elrond
cards.quote: In the House of Elrond, even deep wounds remember how to close.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in this hex is fully healed. If more than 50 health was restored, draw 1 card. Gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Rhun
cards.quote: Rhun is a far shore of smoke and mounted dust, where distant thunder gathers.

cards.name: Hobbiton
cards.quote: The green of Hobbiton seems soft, yet it has a watchful heart.

cards.name: TheShire
cards.quote: The Shire endures by patience and many watchful hands.
